name: Ben Carson
subject: We're leading Hillary Clinton
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29412947:28213254126:m:1:876315805:0C1343867C33706C3C4D276F409229F5:r)
---

Peter,

In the critical, early-voting state of Iowa over the past few months, more people have donated to our campaign than to Hillary Clinton's. We've also had more donors, and more donations, than every other Republican presidential candidate in the race.

A recent poll in the swing state of North Carolina had me beating Hillary Clinton by four points.

The reason? This is more than just a campaign. It's a movement of selfless, patriotic Americans ready to restore what Abraham Lincoln described as a government of, by and for the people.

**But we won't continue to grow this movement without your help.****

**[**So I'd like to ask you to make a donation before we hit our July fundraising deadline. For a donation of $22.16 or more, we'll even send you an official campaign hat before they go on sale to the general public.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29412947:28213254126:m:1:876315805:0C1343867C33706C3C4D276F409229F5:r)
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29412947:28213254126:m:1:876315805:0C1343867C33706C3C4D276F409229F5:r)
---

Sadly, the fact is that "political experience" no longer means wisdom or good judgment, and the more I travel the country, the more I'm convinced that the American people are ready for a new type of leadership.

As a candidate for President, I bring a lifetime of solving problems, of bringing people together.

I bring the utmost care for the future of every American but particularly our children.

I bring the knowledge and understanding of someone who has experienced every rung of America's socioeconomic ladder.

And most importantly, I bring a deep love for the principles and values of our nation, and a steadfast desire to protect and revive them.

**If you are ready for that type of President, I ask you to**[**make a generous donation before we hit our July fundraising deadline.

And for a donation of $22.16 or more, you can help to spread the word to your friends and neighbors with an official campaign hat.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29412947:28213254126:m:1:876315805:0C1343867C33706C3C4D276F409229F5:r)

Thank you for your ongoing support, and God Bless America.
Sincerely,

Ben Carson

| | |
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29412947:28213254126:m:1:876315805:0C1343867C33706C3C4D276F409229F5:r) [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29412948:28213254126:m:1:876315805:0C1343867C33706C3C4D276F409229F5:r)
---
|
---

---|---|---|---
Make a donation | | Show your support for Ben on social media
Carson America, Inc | P.O. Box 26261 | Alexandria, VA 22313

name: John Weaver, Chief Strategist
subject: Deadline Tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich For America, www
body:
[

](www.JohnKasich.com)
Peter, our team had a finance call last night and we agreed that we need to raise another $15,000 to hit our July fundraising goal. [Can you chip in to help us out?](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29415341:28214419541:m:1:958431888:5DA8E1C43FA7CE5EBC9A92067F02DE12:r)

In case you missed our earlier emails, Fox News' Chief White House Correspondent [recently mentioned](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29415342:28214419541:m:1:958431888:5DA8E1C43FA7CE5EBC9A92067F02DE12:r) that of all the GOP candidates, Hillary Clinton's team is most worried about Gov. John Kasich.

Also, a new poll has Gov. Kasich at #3 in New Hampshire. We are seeing real momentum here.

[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29415341:28214419541:m:1:958431888:5DA8E1C43FA7CE5EBC9A92067F02DE12:r)

**[Will you chip in $25, $50 or more right now to help us hit our July fundraising goal](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29415341:28214419541:m:1:958431888:5DA8E1C43FA7CE5EBC9A92067F02DE12:r)** and finish the month strong?

Thank you for all that you're doing to help!

Sincerely,
**
John Weaver**
Chief Strategist

[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29415343:28214419541:m:1:958431888:5DA8E1C43FA7CE5EBC9A92067F02DE12:r)

Void where prohibited. Entries must be received by July 31st, 2015 at 11:59 p.m. Odds of winning depend on number of eligible entries received. One winner will receive the following prize package: two tickets to the Republican Presidential Primary Debate in Cleveland, Ohio, on August 6, 2015; two round-trip coach class airline tickets to Cleveland, Ohio from anywhere in the Continental U.S.; and one night's hotel stay. Approximate retail value $1,800. name: Mandi Karp, MurphyForFlorida.com
subject: The reality is
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| This is a very close race, and we have everything to lose. Friend -- Here's the reality: We're in a very tough race. One of the closest in the country. If we don't hit our fundraising goals this month, we're going to be behind. We weren't planning on having a primary opponent. Now, sooner than later, we're being put to the test. **We won't lose. But if we don't hit our fundraising goals, that's what could happen. Can I count on you to step up with a contribution today -- before our end-of-month deadline?** _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ **[Chip in $5 immediately>>](http://act.murphyforflorida. name: Samantha Gross - Chris Van Hollen for US Senate
subject: not how we operate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
Friend,

If you know Chris even a little, then you know he doesn't rely on a handful of billionaires and special interest groups to fund our campaign. It's just not how we operate. Instead, Chris relies on people like you.

He's working to get secret money out of politics, and that means having an army of grassroots supporters behind him. We set an aggressive goal to have 950 grassroots donations before our midnight Friday deadline. We only need 343 more--will you be one of them?

**_[We need to get 343 more grassroots donors to meet our goal before the end-of-month deadline in just 38 hours. Click here to give now!](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91eba/70cdc2ba/4791528f/3953677/506328265/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_july31?refcode=em073015_1nd&amount=5.00")_** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

**[Donate $3 instantly>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91eba/70cdc2ba/4791528f/3953670/506328265/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_july31?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em073015_1nd")

[Donate $10 instantly >>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91eba/70cdc2ba/4791528f/3953671/506328265/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_july31?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em073015_1nd")

[Donate $25 instantly >>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91eba/70cdc2ba/4791528f/395360e/506328265/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_july31?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em073015_1nd")

[Or, donate another amount >>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91eba/70cdc2ba/4791528f/395360f/506328265/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_july31?refcode=em073015_1nd")** Chris has devoted his entire career to fighting for the rights of the people, and right now he needs you to stand with him today. [](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91eba/70cdc2ba/4791528f/3953676/506328265/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_july31?refcode=em073015_1d&amount=25.00") **_[Click here to help us reach 343 more donors before our deadline.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91eba/70cdc2ba/4791528f/3953676/506328265/VEsHBg/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_july31?refcode=em073015_1d&amount=25.00")_**

Thanks,

Samantha Gross
Finance Director
Van Hollen for Senate

name: Bobby Jindal
subject: Partners in crime
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jindal For President
body:
Last night, I introduced the "Partners in Crime" plan to end sanctuary cities by targeting the lawless city leaders who enable them. If on their watch, an illegal immigrant breaks the law, we will count sanctuary city leaders as accomplices and force them to pay for these crimes.

The United States was built on the rule of law. We don't get to pick and choose which laws we follow and which laws we ignore.

**Sanctuary city leaders are flouting the laws of the United States. They are PARTNERS IN CRIME with illegal aliens. They should be held liable.**

[Donate $100, $50 or even $25 if you think it is time for lawmakers and bureaucrats to stop playing by a separate set of rules and face consequences for their actions.](http://links.jindal.mkt7320.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjMxNjE5NTYS1&r=MTI1NzExOTgyODU0S0&b=0&j=NjAyOTgwMzU5S0&mt=1&rt=0)

Let's see if sanctuary city leaders are willing to go to jail for the criminal acts they enable when they declare themselves above federal law. I suspect the answer is no.

Bobby Jindal

[](http://links.jindal.mkt7320.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjMxNjE5NTYS1&r=MTI1NzExOTgyODU0S0&b=0&j=NjAyOTgwMzU5S0&mt=1&rt=0)

Paid for by Jindal For President
---
[I no longer wish to receive emails](http://links.jindal.mkt7320.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=23161956&r=MTI1NzExOTgyODU0S0&b=0&j=NjAyOTgwMzU5S0&mt=1&rt=0)

If on their watch, an illegal immigrant breaks the law, we will count sanctuary city leaders as accomplices and force them to pay for these crimes. The United States was built on the rule of law. We don't get to pick and choose which laws we follow and which laws we ignore. Sanctuary city leaders are flouting the laws of the United States. They are PARTNERS IN CRIME with illegal aliens. They should be held liable. Let's see if sanctuary city leaders are willing to go to jail for the criminal acts they enable when they declare themselves above federal law. I suspect the answer is no. Bobby Jindal Paid for by Jindal For President

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: If you're with me, get your card now:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
A little something you can carry with you. | Friend --

Two things keep my energy up on the campaign trail: iced tea and the support of this community. You’re a part of that -- thank you -- and I want you to have something to show for it.

**[If you are able to contribute at least $1 before midnight on Friday, my team will be able to issue you an official supporter card.**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjMxNjIwODYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAyOTgxNDk5S0&mt=1&rt=0)

You can keep it in your wallet, or on your fridge, or between the pages of your favorite book. No matter where you keep it, I hope that each time you see it, you know how tremendously grateful I am for your support.

And remember, you are part of something special. This card demonstrates that. Donate as little as $1 before tomorrow night to get yours:

**[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/supporter-card](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjMxNjIwODYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAyOTgxNDk5S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Thanks,

Hillary

---
******Did someone forward this email to you?[Add your name here to get more like it!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjMxNjIwODYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAyOTgxNDk5S0&mt=1&rt=0)** | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjMxNjIwODYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAyOTgxNDk5S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjMxNjIwODYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAyOTgxNDk5S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjMxNjIwODYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAyOTgxNDk5S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjMxNjIwODYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAyOTgxNDk5S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjMxNjIwODYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAyOTgxNDk5S0&mt=1&rt=0). Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjMxNjIwODYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAyOTgxNDk5S0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Doug Stafford
subject: Strategy Memo: Rand Paul's Fight to Defund Planned Parenthood
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
* * *
**MEMORANDUM**
* * *

**DATE** : July 30, 2015

**TO** : Fellow Conservative ; Rand Paul for President Team

**FROM** : Doug Stafford, Chief Strategist

**RE** : Rand Paul's Fight to Defund Planned Parenthood

**PRIORITY** : URGENT!

* * *

The Washington spin machine is very consistent in their efforts to tear down the candidates who are strongest against Hillary Clinton and pump up those candidates who are weakest against Hillary Clinton.

Poll after poll has shown that Rand Paul is the strongest candidate to defeat Hillary Clinton because he simultaneously invigorates the GOP base while reaching out to Independents and disaffected Democrats. **([Breitbart](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29428335:28229867373:m:1:879035888:3CC4E963BAAEC9929E524776497A135D:r))**

There is nothing scarier to liberals than Rand Paul as the Republican nominee. That is why the DNC has attacked Rand Paul more than they have attacked any other GOP candidate. **([The Hill](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29428336:28229867373:m:1:879035888:3CC4E963BAAEC9929E524776497A135D:r))**

That is why the media is trying to destroy his campaign this week.

And that is also why we must have Rand Paul as the nominee.

But the attacks from the Washington spin machine reached a new low soon after Rand led the effort last week to Defund Planned Parenthood.

He gave interviews on the _Laura Ingraham Show, Fox News, Meet the Press_ and a host of other national outlets saying that he would do anything in his power to stop the use of taxpayers' funds from being used to sell the body parts of aborted babies.

Just days later, the stories started coming out saying the campaign is in some sort of turmoil.

Nothing could be further from the truth.

The Washington Machine doesn't want Rand to take on Hillary. And they don't want to Defund Planned Parenthood.

But conservatives aren't going to sit by while liberals try to stop us. We are going to point out the facts:

Rand Paul has built the strongest campaign team. **([Breitbart](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29428337:28229867373:m:1:879035888:3CC4E963BAAEC9929E524776497A135D:r)) **

Rand Paul is the strongest against Hillary Clinton. **([Rare](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29428338:28229867373:m:1:879035888:3CC4E963BAAEC9929E524776497A135D:r))**

Rand Paul raised $7 million with strong grassroots support. **([ Breitbart](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29428339:28229867373:m:1:879035888:3CC4E963BAAEC9929E524776497A135D:r))**

Rand Paul's popularity is surging after taking on Planned Parenthood. **([Conservative Intel](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29428340:28229867373:m:1:879035888:3CC4E963BAAEC9929E524776497A135D:r))**

Rand Paul has gained in the overnight tracking by Reuters every single day since he launched his effort to Defund Planned Parenthood. That is right; Rand has gained support every single day in media polling from the last week.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29428341:28229867373:m:1:879035888:3CC4E963BAAEC9929E524776497A135D:r)

It's no coincidence he is being attacked.

But Rand is not backing down. He is going to fight back with every bone in his body and work the phones right up until the vote next week to Defund Planned Parenthood and stop taxpayer dollars from being used on their disturbing efforts.

He won't back down. He will be the nominee. He will beat Hillary Clinton.

**[Thank you for standing with Rand in this important fight](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29428341:28229867373:m:1:879035888:3CC4E963BAAEC9929E524776497A135D:r)**.

Sincerely,

Doug Stafford
Chief Strategist
Rand Paul for President

PS: Please forward this email to your email lists and post on social media so that conservatives understand that we are not backing down.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29428342:28229867373:m:1:879035888:3CC4E963BAAEC9929E524776497A135D:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29428343:28229867373:m:1:879035888:3CC4E963BAAEC9929E524776497A135D:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29428344:28229867373:m:1:879035888:3CC4E963BAAEC9929E524776497A135D:r) Paid for by Rand Paul for President
---

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 16, 2015.
For more information [click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWeB12LmNp). [Update your preferences](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWeB12LmNp)
[Unsubscribe](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWeB12LmNp) | [Unsubscribe via email](mailto:unsub-28229867373-echo3-27D848E62C536314D190F965781E8086@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings)

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: a quick note:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
Friend,

Just wanted to shoot you a quick email before the end-of-month deadline hits in just 32 hours. We only need 343 more grassroots donations to hit our goal. It's important to me and to this race that we show just how many people are standing with us as we fight to take back the Senate.

Please, give a gift to this link: **_[http://action.vanhollen.org/july](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91e87/70cdc2ba/47913f14/39536d6/1912503504/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_july31?refcode=em073015_2nd&amount=5.00")_**

With so many people across the country watching our race, it's crucial we don't miss this goal.

Thanks for everything,

Chris

| Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91e87/70cdc2ba/47913f14/39536d7/1912503504/VEsF/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages, please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Last night was historic
body:
#
When we started our campaign together, much of the corporate-owned media wrote us off. They said we had no chance, that we couldn't win, that victory was impossible.
**Well, I am here to tell you, friend, it 's not impossible: it's happening.**
Last night, we estimate that 100,000 supporters attended more than 3,500 organizing meetings in all fifty states across the country. It was a historic evening -- the largest campaign gathering of this election by a huge margin. And at every event, people signed up to volunteer and committed themselves to building a movement capable of winning an election and reclaiming our democracy from the billionaire class.
In American politics, there are two primary sources of power: organized people, and organized money. Last night proved that we have the people and that we're well organized.
And so far, we've received over 500,000 individual contributions for an average gift of $33.26. But we can't stop now.
**[Your $3 contribution today will help us continue to build a movement powerful enough to defeat a billionaire class that has already bought Congress, and now has its sights set on the White House.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb20dd/43f17890/5d236ac7/621d555f/2607284160/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/july-29-2015?refcode=em150730july29-normal-b")**
[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb20dd/43f17890/5d236ac7/621d555f/2607284160/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/july-29-2015?refcode=em150730july29-normal-b")
When the people stand together, there is nothing we cannot accomplish.
Not only can we win a Democratic primary and general election, but we can ensure that no one who works a full-time job lives in poverty. We can provide education as a right for all Americans, not just wealthy families. We can guarantee health care as a right, not a privilege, in this country.
Nothing significant in this country happens in terms of change unless a strong grassroots movement takes place.
That's what we're building together, and people should not underestimate us.
**[Add your $3 contribution to our campaign today.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb20dd/43f17890/5d236ac7/621d555f/2607284160/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/july-29-2015?refcode=em150730july29-normal-b")**
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders

[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb20dd/43f17890/5d236ac7/621d555f/2607284160/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/july-29-2015?refcode=em150730july29-normal-b")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb20dd/43f17890/5d236ac7/621d555c/2607284160/VEsD/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb20dd/43f17890/5d236ac7/621d555d/2607284160/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb20dd/43f17890/5d236ac7/621d555a/2607284160/VEsB/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb20dd/43f17890/5d236ac7/621d555b/2607284160/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").
